name: MapLayout Pro
description: Professional cartographic map layouts from your browser — no desktop GIS required.
author: Osman O. A. Ibrahim

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *; connect-src 'self' *
